candidates.snippet: the Stencil Fonts Series. Couteau is Pané-Farré’s second published typeface, joining his Orly Stencil, both released in 2012. Couteau is shaped by cutting. Brisk curves, sharp corners, and abrupt angles are common among

F, TTF, WOFF, and WOFF2 formats. Legacy font formats are available on request. The Stencil Fonts Series was launched on April 19 2012 to accompany the exhibition 'Between Writing & Type: the Stencil Letter' held at Catap
